title: OpenAI's latest service wants to get your company build and get better integrated with AI agents
excerpt: OpenAI Presence looks to offer better integration for AI agents
content_html:
• OpenAI Presence is a new tool to monitor and update AI agent behavior
  • It works across voice and chat agents from launch, including OpenAI's phone support
  • Presence is led by forward-deployed engineers who already know an organization inside-out

OpenAI has launched a new, dedicated platform for building, deploying and iterating AI agents for business workflows, which it's calling OpenAI Presence.

From launch, the tool focuses on voice and chat agents that can answer questions, resolve problems, access company systems, perform approved actions and liaise with humans.

The addition comes in response to what the company sees as the challenge of keeping agents reliable after deployment.

Presence keeps your agents current and relevant

For example, OpenAI explained how agent behavior may need to change as company policies, products, systems and customers evolve.

With agents only granted access to the knowledge and systems needed for a particular task, the ChatGPT maker wants to keep decisions like what the agent is authorized to do, which actions require human approval, which policies must be followed and when the interaction must be escalated to company admins.

"Every deployment generated insights that continuously inform OpenAI research and product development, creating compounding benefits for customers," the company noted, adding that Presence comes from years of first-hand experience dealing with customers.

Presence also includes a Codex-powered improvement process designed to help agents continue evolving once they've been launched, with the agentic coding assistant capable of investigating behavior and proposing changes.

Sign up to the TechRadar Pro newsletter to get all the top news, opinion, features and guidance your business needs to succeed!

OpenAI also used its announcement to plug its forward-deployed engineer (FDE) program, which inserts OpenAI experts within customer organizations to build AI tools and processes tailored to their exact needs.

The new tool already powers the company's English phone support service (1-888-GPT-0090), handling open-ended requests, accessing account information and taking actions across billing and refunds.

Presence deployments are also FDE-led, and certain eligible enterprise customers can get access to the scheme through a limited general availability program.

Follow TechRadar on Google News and add us as a preferred source to get our expert news, reviews, and opinion in your feeds.

With several years’ experience freelancing in tech and automotive circles, Craig’s specific interests lie in technology that is designed to better our lives, including AI and ML, productivity aids, and smart fitness. He is also passionate about cars and the decarbonisation of personal transportation. As an avid bargain-hunter, you can be sure that any deal Craig finds is top value!

blocks.html_en: "Every deployment generated insights that continuously inform OpenAI research and product development, creating compounding benefits for customers," the company noted, adding that Presence comes from years of first-hand experience dealing with customers.

blocks.html_en: Presence also includes a Codex-powered improvement process designed to help agents continue evolving once they've been launched, with the agentic coding assistant capable of investigating behavior and proposing changes.

content_html_zh:
• OpenAI Presence 是一款用于监控和更新 AI 代理行为的新工具
  • 它自推出以来就适用于语音和聊天代理，包括 OpenAI 的电话支持
  • 存在由前沿部署的工程师领导，他们已经对组织了如指掌

OpenAI 推出了一个新的专用平台，用于为业务工作流程构建、部署和迭代人工智能代理，称之为 OpenAI Presence。

从发布以来，该工具专注于语音和聊天代理，可以回答问题、解决问题、访问公司系统、执行批准的操作以及与人类联络。

该增加是为了应对该公司认为在部署后保持代理可靠的挑战。

让您的座席保持最新状态并保持相关性

例如，OpenAI 解释了随着公司政策、产品、系统和客户的发展，代理行为可能需要如何改变。

由于代理仅被授予访问特定任务所需的知识和系统的权限，ChatGPT 制造者希望保留诸如授权代理执行哪些操作、哪些操作需要人工批准、必须遵循哪些策略以及何时必须将交互升级给公司管理员等决策。

该公司指出：“每次部署都会产生见解，不断为 OpenAI 研究和产品开发提供信息，为客户创造复合效益。”并补充说，Presence 来自多年与客户打交道的第一手经验。

Presence 还包括一个由 Codex 支持的改进流程，旨在帮助代理在启动后继续发展，代理编码助手能够调查行为并提出更改建议。

订阅 TechRadar Pro 时事通讯，获取您的企业成功所需的所有热门新闻、观点、功能和指导！

OpenAI 还利用其公告来插入其前沿部署工程师 (FDE) 计划，该计划将 OpenAI 专家插入客户组织中，以构建适合其确切需求的 AI 工具和流程。

新工具已经为该公司的英语电话支持服务 (1-888-GPT-0090) 提供支持，处理开放式请求、访问帐户信息并采取跨计费和退款的操作。

存在部署也是 FDE 主导的，某些符合条件的企业客户可以通过有限的通用可用性计划访问该计划。

在 Google 新闻上关注 TechRadar，并将我们添加为首选来源，以便在您的 Feed 中获取我们的专家新闻、评论和意见。

克雷格在科技和汽车领域拥有多年的自由职业经验，他的具体兴趣在于旨在改善我们生活的技术，包括人工智能和机器学习、生产力辅助工具和智能健身。 他还热衷于汽车和个人交通的脱碳。 作为一名狂热的讨价还价者，您可以确信克雷格发现的任何交易都是超值的！
